banner_text: 🐾 Now offering Physical Rehabilitation — State-of-the-Art Care for Your Pup!
home_hero_desc: Luxurious lodging suites, spacious play parks, a full-service spa, and a state-of-the-art Physical Rehabilitation Center added in 2023.
home_card1_desc: Spacious suites with cozy bedding and nightly check-ins
home_card3_desc: Premium organic food & treats, free delivery available
home_story_title: A Place Where Dogs Truly Feel at Home
home_story_p1: Founded in 2018, Petcare Spa began as a dream brought to life by Jalene with the help of her family — Ed, Michael, Halle — and their beloved rescues, Matzha Ball the Cockapoo and Sawyer the kitty.
home_story_p2: Today, Petcare Spa is a 20,000-square-foot facility designed with dogs' comfort, safety, and happiness at the heart of every detail. Our team has grown to over 40 dedicated staff members.
home_story_p3: Our high-flow air quality system equipped with UV sanitizing light eliminates 99.9% of viruses, bacteria, mold, and other pathogens.
home_diff1_desc: From daycare to lodging, grooming to physical rehab, we've got every need covered in one location.
home_diff2_desc: Day or night, our team is on-site watching over every bark, yawn, and playful jump.
home_diff3_desc: Clean, comfortable spaces with attentive supervision. Staff-to-dog ratio of 1:12–15.
home_diff4_desc: High-flow air quality system with UV sanitizing lights. Kills 99.9% of viruses, bacteria, and mold.
home_diff5_desc: Our PawFeast line offers 100% certified organic food, fresh ingredients, and free delivery on every order above 300k₫.
home_flip1_desc: Professional care tips for your pet's health and happiness.
home_flip2_desc: Helping pets recover with modern therapy solutions.
home_flip3_desc: Premium grooming for a clean and stylish look.
home_flip4_desc: Safe and fun environments for pets to play.
home_play_title: A Playground Paradise For Every Pup
home_play_desc: Multiple play parks designed to support all play styles and energy levels.
home_play_indoor_1: Cushioned flooring to reduce joint strain
home_play_note: Daycare is included with every boarding stay
home_play_note_desc: đảm bảo mỗi bé cún đều được vận động, vui chơi và giao lưu suốt cả ngày.
home_review1_text: Our 11-year-old Havanese, Lulu, has been a weekly visitor to the Physical Rehabilitation Center since January 2024. Amy, Kate and their crew gave Lulu her life back.
home_review2_text: Everyone on the rehab team is so kind. Our old girl absolutely LOVES them! They've been crucial in improving her mobility and building strength to maintain quality of life!
home_review3_text: We have used Petcare Spa for several years, both for day care and grooming. Ed and Jalene and their staff are wonderful. We highly recommend them!
home_blog1_title: How to Prepare Your Dog for Their First Boarding Stay
home_blog2_title: What is Canine Physical Rehabilitation and Who Needs It?
home_blog3_title: Why Organic Food Is the Best Choice for Your Pet's Health
footer_desc: Whether your pet is here for a day or a month, they are part of our family. Premium care, organic nutrition, free delivery.
footer_address: 18 Street 35, Cat Lai, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
